radflow-clinical-rag.description: Read-only clinical guideline RAG (search_guidelines, get_guideline_passage, list_corpus_sources). Dev/eval only.

radflow-intake-scribe.description: Voice + OCR intake pipelines as tools (transcribe_voice, extract_intake_fields, ocr_document). Dev fixtures only; no live PHI.

filesystem.description: Anthropic reference filesystem MCP. Used by the dev/eval agent to load anonymised CXR metadata, guideline PDFs, and prompt templates; write generated prompt versions and eval reports (dev only).

notes: MCP is a dev/eval-time capability, not part of the production edge product. Production PHC deployments run fully offline with no inbound MCP surface.
